steps.title: Break down the claim
steps.content: The claim has three parts: the rider is experienced, mainly bikes to work, and prefers routes that reduce travel time. The supporting response must show all three together.

steps.title: Check each response
steps.content: Choice A is infrequent shopping by bike, not experienced commuting. Choice B mentions a new bike and future rides with friends, with no work route. Choice D mentions biking to work but gives no route preference. The response about biking to work daily and choosing the faster route fits all parts. The answer is C.
